summary: Legal document maker web app with Internet Identity authentication (passkeys, Google, Apple, or Microsoft sign-in).
architectural_notes: Authentication: Internet Identity only (passkeys, Google, Apple, Microsoft) — no email/password login

existing_features.title: Add Internet Identity authentication (passkeys, Google, Apple, or Microsoft sign-in) to the legal document maker app. The Header component must display a login button for unauthenticated users that triggers the Internet Identity flow, and show the user's profile/logout options when authenticated.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add Internet Identity login (passkeys, Google, Apple, or Microsoft) to the legal doc maker
